title: Set vs WeakSet in JavaScript
summary: JavaScript provides various data structures to manage collections of data, and two commonly used ones are Set and WeakSet. Both are used to store collections of values, but they have distinct characteristics and use cases. In this blog, we will explore the differences between Set and WeakSet with examples to help you understand when to use each one.
